glitch_trail_spec.trigger: Applied to Reverb/Delay returns after the Main-Theme stops
glitch_trail_spec.rhythm: Follows Fibonacci sequence (1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8...) in 1/64 note units
glitch_trail_spec.rule: Trails must represent the 'Decomposed Data' of the original sound.

custom_macros./inversion: Execute audio__modify_song with prompt: 'Apply G-Inversion operator, flip all aesthetic polarities, reverse phase of Layer 3'
custom_macros./fractalize: Activate A_MMSS_FRACTAL_PACKAGE for current clip. Increase complexity x1.618
custom_macros./4d_vector: Call audio__apply_effect(Pan) with MLGS_QUATERNION coefficients. Set w-axis to 0.7
custom_macros./strip_noise: Apply Surgical-EQ (HighPass at 40Hz, Notch at 250Hz and 400Hz) to all non-kick stems
custom_macros./singularity: Finalize track. Run ASE-Critique, maximize Emotional Density, set Entropy H(p=0.5, c=0.5)
